items.line_en: Financial advisors, in this video, we're going to go over the one question I use to start all of my first meetings with prospective clients.

coach.say: Financial advisors, in this video, we're going to go over the one question I use to start all of my first meetings with prospective clients.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Financial advisors, / in this video, / we're going to go over the one question I use to start all of my first meetings with prospective clients.

items.line_en: And I encourage you to give this a try in your next first meeting because one, it's very easy, and two, you'll be amazed at the response that you get and where the conversation goes.

coach.say: And I encourage you to give this a try in your next first meeting because one, it's very easy, and two, you'll be amazed at the response that you get and where the conversation goes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I encourage you to give this a try in your next first meeting because one, / it's very easy, / and two, / you'll be amazed at the response that you get and where the conversation goes.

items.line_en: It works because it's a fail-safe way to start a chat that quickly turns into a real conversation.

coach.say: It works because it's a fail-safe way to start a chat that quickly turns into a real conversation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It works because / it's a fail-safe way to start a chat that quickly turns into a real conversation.

items.line_en: Because that's what we're looking for, right? And it invites people to get to the heart of the matter and share what's most important to them.

coach.say: Because that's what we're looking for, right? And it invites people to get to the heart of the matter and share what's most important to them.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Because that's what we're looking for, / right? / And it invites people to get to the heart of the matter and share what's most important to them.

items.line_en: And there are actually two follow-up questions that I use after that first one.

coach.say: And there are actually two follow-up questions that I use after that first one.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And there are actually two follow-up questions that I use after that first one.

items.line_en: So I'll share those along with that opening question.

coach.say: So I'll share those along with that opening question.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So I'll share those along with that opening question.

items.line_en: And these questions come from the book, The Coaching Habit by Michael Stanier.

coach.say: And these questions come from the book, The Coaching Habit by Michael Stanier.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And these questions come from the book, / The Coaching Habit by Michael Stanier.

items.line_en: And it actually includes seven crucial questions that coaches use to ask their clients, but I picked out the top ones that advisors can use.

coach.say: And it actually includes seven crucial questions that coaches use to ask their clients, but I picked out the top ones that advisors can use.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And it actually includes seven crucial questions that coaches use to ask their clients, / but I picked out the top ones that advisors can use.

items.line_en: And it's really been so good, that's how we've been opening our meetings for the last four years.

coach.say: And it's really been so good, that's how we've been opening our meetings for the last four years.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And it's really been so good, / that's how we've been opening our meetings for the last four years.

items.line_en: And very quickly, if I haven't met you yet, I'm Dave Zoller. I run a successful wealth management for streamlined financial with my business partner, Tim.

coach.say: And very quickly, if I haven't met you yet, I'm Dave Zoller. I run a successful wealth management for streamlined financial with my business partner, Tim.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And very quickly, if I haven't met you yet, / I'm Dave Zoller. I run a successful wealth management for streamlined financial with my business partner, Tim.

items.line_en: And we created this channel because most of the other channels teaching practice management for advisors or communication techniques, they weren't created by advisors who are actually growing their business like we are.

coach.say: And we created this channel because most of the other channels teaching practice management for advisors or communication techniques, they weren't created by advisors who are actually growing their business like we are.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And we created this channel because most of the other channels teaching practice management for advisors or communication techniques, / they weren't created by advisors who are actually growing their business like we are.

items.line_en: So subscribe if you'd like to have this as a free resource for you as you're growing your business.

coach.say: So subscribe if you'd like to have this as a free resource for you as you're growing your business.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So subscribe if / you'd like to have this as a free resource for you as you're growing your business.

items.line_en: Now onto the first question. It's very simple, and it's just, so what's on your mind?

coach.say: Now onto the first question. It's very simple, and it's just, so what's on your mind?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now onto the first question. / It's very simple, / and it's just, / so what's on your mind?

items.line_en: That's it. Once you say those four words, just be quiet and you'll be amazed at the information that they start to share with you.

coach.say: That's it. Once you say those four words, just be quiet and you'll be amazed at the information that they start to share with you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: That's it. / Once you say those four words, / just be quiet and you'll be amazed at the information that they start to share with you.

items.line_en: Why does it work so well? It's a question that really says, let's get to the thing that matters the most about you.

coach.say: Why does it work so well? It's a question that really says, let's get to the thing that matters the most about you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Why does it work so well? / It's a question that really says, / let's get to the thing that matters the most about you.

items.line_en: I've actually never had a dead-end answer like, well, I just want to plan for retirement or I just need help with financial planning.

coach.say: I've actually never had a dead-end answer like, well, I just want to plan for retirement or I just need help with financial planning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've actually never had a dead-end answer like, / well, / I just want to plan for retirement or I just need help with financial planning.

items.line_en: Usually the prospective client will talk for at least 30 seconds and really up to two to three minutes.

coach.say: Usually the prospective client will talk for at least 30 seconds and really up to two to three minutes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Usually the prospective client will talk for at least 30 seconds and / really up to two to three minutes.

items.line_en: And while they talk, all I'm doing is writing down the quotes that I hear, the problems that they have and what they need help with.

coach.say: And while they talk, all I'm doing is writing down the quotes that I hear, the problems that they have and what they need help with.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And while they talk, / all I'm doing is writing down the quotes that I hear, / the problems that they have and what they need help with.

items.line_en: And for some reason they don't talk much, which I can't really see that happening, there are two more crucial follow-up questions that I'll ask.

coach.say: And for some reason they don't talk much, which I can't really see that happening, there are two more crucial follow-up questions that I'll ask.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And for some reason they don't talk much, / which I can't really see that happening, / there are two more crucial follow-up questions that I'll ask.

items.line_en: And really, even if they do talk a lot, I'll ask these questions anyways that really moves the conversation even deeper.

coach.say: And really, even if they do talk a lot, I'll ask these questions anyways that really moves the conversation even deeper.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And really, / even if they do talk a lot, / I'll ask these questions anyways that really moves the conversation even deeper.

items.line_en: The second question is one that's called the AWK question.

coach.say: The second question is one that's called the AWK question.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The second question is one that's called the AWK question.

items.line_en: So once they're done answering that first one, you say, and what else?

coach.say: So once they're done answering that first one, you say, and what else?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So once they're done answering that first one, / you say, / and what else?

items.line_en: This innocuous question invites them to go a little bit deeper.

coach.say: This innocuous question invites them to go a little bit deeper.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This innocuous question invites them to go a little bit deeper.

items.line_en: It helps them become more self aware of the problems that they want to solve for and the help that they might be looking for.

coach.say: It helps them become more self aware of the problems that they want to solve for and the help that they might be looking for.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It helps them become more self aware of the problems that they want to solve for and / the help that they might be looking for.

items.line_en: And you can actually ask this question a few times and wait until they say, I don't think there's anything else.

coach.say: And you can actually ask this question a few times and wait until they say, I don't think there's anything else.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And you can actually ask this question a few times and wait until they say, / I don't think there's anything else.

items.line_en: And then the next question after that is one that will help them identify exactly how they want you to help them.

coach.say: And then the next question after that is one that will help them identify exactly how they want you to help them.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then the next question after that is one that will help them identify exactly how they want you to help them.

items.line_en: And actually, now that I think about it, there's really two questions that I'll use interchangeably here, depending on how the conversation goes.

coach.say: And actually, now that I think about it, there's really two questions that I'll use interchangeably here, depending on how the conversation goes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And actually, / now that I think about it, / there's really two questions that I'll use interchangeably here, / depending on how the conversation goes.

items.line_en: And you'll notice it as you're starting your own conversations.

coach.say: And you'll notice it as you're starting your own conversations.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And you'll notice it as you're starting your own conversations.

items.line_en: I'll share both of them with you here and then we'll see which one fits better in each conversation.

coach.say: I'll share both of them with you here and then we'll see which one fits better in each conversation.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll share both of them with you here and / then we'll see which one fits better in each conversation.

items.line_en: On the time, I'll ask, so what's the real challenge for you here?

coach.say: On the time, I'll ask, so what's the real challenge for you here?
coach.hint: Chunk it: On the time, / I'll ask, / so what's the real challenge for you here?

items.line_en: This is the question that'll help them slow down so that you can spend time solving the real problem and not just the first problem that they think of.

coach.say: This is the question that'll help them slow down so that you can spend time solving the real problem and not just the first problem that they think of.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is the question that'll help them slow down so that you can spend time solving the real problem and / not just the first problem that they think of.

items.line_en: And then part of the time, I'll ask this question.

coach.say: And then part of the time, I'll ask this question.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then part of the time, / I'll ask this question.

items.line_en: And I'm aware here, sorry, I put a few more questions in here than I was planning.

coach.say: And I'm aware here, sorry, I put a few more questions in here than I was planning.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I'm aware here, / sorry, / I put a few more questions in here than I was planning.

items.line_en: So I'll make a list at the end of this video so that they're all clearly there.

coach.say: So I'll make a list at the end of this video so that they're all clearly there.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So I'll make a list at the end of this video so / that they're all clearly there.

items.line_en: So that second question that I'll use interchangeably is, so what do you really want?

coach.say: So that second question that I'll use interchangeably is, so what do you really want?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So that second question that I'll use interchangeably is, / so what do you really want?

items.line_en: This is direct and it has the effect of pulling people to that desired outcome that they're looking for.

coach.say: This is direct and it has the effect of pulling people to that desired outcome that they're looking for.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This is direct and / it has the effect of pulling people to that desired outcome that they're looking for.

items.line_en: And once you can see the destination, the journey becomes more clear.

coach.say: And once you can see the destination, the journey becomes more clear.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And once you can see the destination, / the journey becomes more clear.

items.line_en: Now before that final question, if this was helpful, please click the like button and subscribe so that I know to make more videos like this one, just for financial advisors like you.

coach.say: Now before that final question, if this was helpful, please click the like button and subscribe so that I know to make more videos like this one, just for financial advisors like you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Now before that final question, / if this was helpful, / please click the like button and subscribe so that I know to make more videos like this one, / just for financial advisors like you.

items.line_en: So the final question that we'll ask to close this series of just the first few minutes of talking is a question.

coach.say: So the final question that we'll ask to close this series of just the first few minutes of talking is a question.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So the final question that we'll ask to close this series of just the first few minutes of talking is a question.

items.line_en: It's a great way to find out exactly what they would like in a relationship with you.

coach.say: It's a great way to find out exactly what they would like in a relationship with you.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's a great way to find out exactly what they would like in a relationship with you.

items.line_en: And that question is simply,

coach.say: And that question is simply,
coach.hint: Chunk it: And that question is simply,

items.line_en: how would you like me to help?

coach.say: how would you like me to help?
coach.hint: Chunk it: how would you like me to help?

items.line_en: It forces them to make a direct and clear request and it stops you from thinking that you know how best to help and then leaping into action.

coach.say: It forces them to make a direct and clear request and it stops you from thinking that you know how best to help and then leaping into action.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It forces them to make a direct and clear request and it stops you from thinking that you know how best to help and / then leaping into action.

items.line_en: So now the summary of all the questions here are one, so what's on your mind?

coach.say: So now the summary of all the questions here are one, so what's on your mind?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So now the summary of all the questions here are one, / so what's on your mind?

coach.say: And what else?
coach.hint: Chunk it: And what else?

items.line_en: And then what's the real challenge here or interchangeably?

coach.say: And then what's the real challenge here or interchangeably?
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then what's the real challenge here or / interchangeably?

items.line_en: What do you really want?

coach.say: What do you really want?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What do you really want?

items.line_en: And then how would you like me to help?

coach.say: And then how would you like me to help?
coach.hint: Chunk it: And then how would you like me to help?

items.line_en: So really, I guess there's five questions here.

coach.say: So really, I guess there's five questions here.
coach.hint: Chunk it: So really, / I guess there's five questions here.

items.line_en: But the first one, what's on your mind has been the best way to start our client conversations and our prospective client conversations.

coach.say: But the first one, what's on your mind has been the best way to start our client conversations and our prospective client conversations.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But the first one, / what's on your mind has been the best way to start our client conversations and our prospective client conversations.

items.line_en: But I encourage you to test it out, to try it and then try some of the other ones too and see where the conversation goes.

coach.say: But I encourage you to test it out, to try it and then try some of the other ones too and see where the conversation goes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But I encourage you to test it out, / to try it and then try some of the other ones too and see where the conversation goes.

coach.say: You might be surprised at how well it does go.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You might be surprised at how well it does go.

items.line_en: And I'd love to hear from you in the comments.

coach.say: And I'd love to hear from you in the comments.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I'd love to hear from you in the comments.

coach.say: If you try these, let me know how it went.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you try these, / let me know how it went.

items.line_en: Or if you have a great way that you open up meetings right now or questions that you like, please put them in the comments below.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Or if you have a great way that you open up meetings right now or questions that you like, / please put them in the comments below.

coach.hint: Chunk it: And then I'll send you a response as well.
